children.text: the retired pay base for that person as computed under section 1406(b)(2) or 1407 of this title; and
2½ percent of the years of service credited to that person under .section 12733 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: If a person entitled to retired pay under this chapter has been credited by the Secretary concerned with extraordinary heroism in the line of duty and if the highest grade held satisfactorily by that person at any time in the armed forces is an enlisted grade, the person’s retired pay shall be increased by 10 percent of the amount determined under subsection (a). The Secretary’s determination as to extraordinary heroism is conclusive for all purposes.

Except as provided in paragraph (2), the total amount of the monthly retired pay computed under subsections (a) and (b) may not exceed 75 percent of the retired pay base upon which the computation is based.

children.label: A
children.text: 75 percent of the retired pay base upon which the computation is based; and

children.label: i
children.text: the retired pay base upon which the computation is based; and

children.label: ii
children.text: 2½ percent of the years of service credited to that person under , for service under conditions authorized for purposes of this paragraph during a period designated by the Secretary of Defense for purposes of this paragraph.section 12733 of this title

children.label: d
children.text: Amounts computed under this section, if not a multiple of $1, shall be rounded down to the next lower multiple of $1.

If a member of the Retired Reserve is recalled to an active status in the Selected Reserve of the Ready Reserve under and completes not less than two years of service in such active status, the member is entitled to the recomputation under this section of the retired pay of the member.section 10145(d) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: is recalled to serve in a position of adjutant general required under or in a position of assistant adjutant general subordinate to such a position of adjutant general;section 314 of title 32

children.label: B
children.text: completes at least one year of service in such position; and

children.label: C
children.text: fails to complete the minimum two years of service solely because the appointment of the member to such position is terminated or vacated as described in .section 324(b) of title 32

children.label: A
children.text: subsection (a)(2) shall be applied by substituting “2 percent” for “2½ percent”;

children.label: B
children.text: subparagraph (A) of subsection (c)(2) shall be applied by substituting “60 percent” for “75 percent”; and

children.label: C
children.text: subparagraph (B)(ii) of such subsection shall be applied by substituting “2 percent” for “2½ percent”.

children.heading: Election to participate in modernized retirement system.—
children.label: 2 Election to participate in modernized retirement system.—

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: A .—In general
children.text: Pursuant to subparagraph (B), a person performing reserve component service on , who has performed fewer than 12 years of service as of (as computed in accordance with ), may elect, in exchange for the reduced multipliers described in paragraph (1) for purposes of calculating the retired pay of the person, to receive Thrift Savings Plan contributions pursuant to .December 31, 2017December 31, 2017section 12733 of this titlesection 8440e(e) of title 5

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: i .—In general
children.text: Except as provided in clauses (ii) and (iii), a person described in subparagraph (A) may make the election described in that subparagraph during the period that begins on , and ends on .January 1, 2018December 31, 2018

children.heading: .—Hardship extension
children.label: ii .—Hardship extension
children.text: The Secretary concerned may extend the election period described in clause (i) for a person who experiences a hardship as determined by the Secretary concerned.

children.heading: .—Persons experiencing break in service
children.label: iii .—Persons experiencing break in service
children.text: A person returning to reserve component service after a break in reserve component service in which falls the election period specified in clause (i) shall make the election described in subparagraph (A) within 30 days after the date of the reentry into service of the person.

children.heading: .—No retroactive contributions pursuant to election
children.label: C .—No retroactive contributions pursuant to election
children.text: Thrift Savings Plan contributions may not be made for a person making an election pursuant to subparagraph (A) for any pay period beginning before the date of the person’s election under that subparagraph by reason of the person’s election.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: 3 .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall prescribe regulations to implement this subsection.
